sql_array: CREATE TABLE Orders (OrderID INT, ShippedDate VARCHAR(50), Quantity INT);
INSERT INTO Orders (OrderID, ShippedDate, Quantity) VALUES (1, '1996.06.04 12:00:00 000000', 10);
INSERT INTO Orders (OrderID, ShippedDate, Quantity) VALUES (2, '1996.06.05 13:30:30 500000', 20);
INSERT INTO Orders (OrderID, ShippedDate, Quantity) VALUES (3, '1996.06.05 09:00:00 300000', 5);
SELECT OrderID FROM Orders WHERE Quantity > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate > stringdate('1996.06.03 00:00:00 000000')) OR ShippedDate = stringdate('1996.06.05 08:00:00 000000');
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Orders WHERE (stringdate('1996.06.03 00:00:00 000000') OR stringdate('1996.06.05 12:00:00 000000')) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT left(datestring(stringdate('1996.06.04 00:00:00 000000')), 10) AS FormattedDate FROM Orders WHERE (ShippedDate = '1996.06.04 12:00:00 000000' OR Quantity IS NULL);

SELECT OrderID, STRING_AGG(datestring(stringdate(ShippedDate)), ', ') AS ShipmentDates FROM Orders GROUP BY OrderID HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate < stringdate('1996.06.06 00:00:00 000000'));
SELECT OrderID FROM Orders WHERE ShippedDate IN (SELECT ShippedDate FROM Orders WHERE Quantity = (SELECT MAX(Quantity) FROM Orders) OR Quantity IS NULL);
SELECT OrderID, ShippedDate FROM Orders WHERE stringdate(ShippedDate) BETWEEN stringdate('1996.06.03 00:00:00 000000') AND stringdate('1996.06.05 00:00:00 000000') OR Quantity < 1;
